name: OutRatio[S11]
description: Split outlet stream flow ratio (only specify if never zero flow)

name: OutRatio[S12]
description: Split outlet stream flow ratio (only specify if never zero flow)

name: RatioSum
description: Split OutRatio sum (specify RatioSum=1 when all OutRatios are calculated)

name: SumCin[N2]
description: Split sum of inlet component molar rates

name: SumCin[O2]
description: Split sum of inlet component molar rates

name: SumCin[H2O]
description: Split sum of inlet component molar rates

name: SumCout[N2]
description: Split sum of outlet component molar rates

name: SumCout[O2]
description: Split sum of outlet component molar rates

name: SumCout[H2O]
description: Split sum of outlet component molar rates

name: SumFHin
description: Split sum of the inlet's molar enthalpy

name: SumFHout
description: Split sum of the outlet's molar enthalpy

name: absFbal
description: Split absolute of the molar balance, ie. the difference between inlet and outlet molar flow

name: setp
description: Split stream pressure set flag from upstream model for mode check warnings   (0 - model sets flow, 1 - model sets pressure)

name: dMMtdt
description: Split total molar holdup time derivative
